translation: Actions are judged by intentions

text: مَن كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ متعمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ
translation: Whoever lies about me deliberately, let him take his seat in the Fire
Faith has seventy-odd branches

text: لاَ يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
translation: None of you believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself
Religion is sincerity

text: مَنْ بَنَى لِلَّهِ مَسْجِدًا بَنَى اللَّهُ لَهُ بَيْتًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ
translation: Whoever builds a mosque for Allah, Allah will build for him a house in Paradise
Purification is half of faith
Pray as you have seen me praying
The five prayers are expiation for what is between them
The best people are my generation

text: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
translation: A Muslim is one from whose tongue and hand Muslims are safe
Save yourself from the Fire even with half a date
Paradise lies at the feet of mothers
There should be neither harming nor reciprocating harm

text: الْمُؤْمِنُ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ كَالْبُنْيَانِ يَشُدُّ بَعْضُهُ بَعْضًا
translation: The believer to another believer is like a building, each part strengthening the other
Give gifts and you will love one another
The merciful will be shown mercy by the Most Merciful
The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it

text: مَنْ صَامَ رَمَضَانَ إِيمَانًا وَاحْتِسَابًا غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ
translation: Whoever fasts Ramadan with faith and seeking reward, his past sins will be forgiven

text: الْحَجُّ الْمَبْرُورُ لَيْسَ لَهُ جَزَاءٌ إِلاَّ الْجَنَّةُ
translation: An accepted Hajj has no reward except Paradise

text: مَنْ قَامَ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ إِيمَانًا وَاحْتِسَابًا غُفِرَ لَهُ
translation: Whoever stands in prayer on Laylat al-Qadr with faith and seeking reward will be forgiven

text: إِذَا دَخَلَ رَمَضَانُ فُتِّحَتْ أَبْوَابُ الْجَنَّةِ
translation: When Ramadan enters, the gates of Paradise are opened

text: الصَّدَقَةُ تُطْفِئُ الْخَطِيئَةَ كَمَا يُطْفِئُ الْمَاءُ النَّارَ
translation: Charity extinguishes sin as water extinguishes fire

text: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيُكْرِمْ ضَيْفَهُ
translation: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should honor his guest

text: لَيْسَ الْغِنَى عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْعَرَضِ وَلَكِنَّ الْغِنَى غِنَى النَّفْسِ
translation: Wealth is not in abundance of possessions, but wealth is richness of the soul
A kind word is charity
Be conscious of Allah wherever you are

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ طَيِّبٌ لاَ يَقْبَلُ إِلاَّ طَيِّبًا
translation: Allah is pure and accepts only that which is pure

text: الْمُؤْمِنُ الْقَوِيُّ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِ الضَّعِيفِ
translation: The strong believer is better than the weak believer
Guard Allah and He will guard you

text: مَنْ حُسْنِ إِسْلاَمِ الْمَرْءِ تَرْكُهُ مَا لاَ يَعْنِيهِ
translation: Part of the perfection of one's Islam is leaving that which does not concern him
Every Muslim is sacred to another Muslim
Charity does not decrease wealth
The one who guides to good is like the one who does it

text: أَحَبُّ الأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَدْوَمُهَا وَإِنْ قَلَّ
translation: The most beloved deeds to Allah are the most consistent, even if small

text: مَنْ يُرِدِ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ
translation: Whoever Allah wishes good for, He grants him understanding of the religion
Oppression will be darkness on the Day of Resurrection
Indeed, there is wisdom in some poetry
Modesty is part of faith

text: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
translation: Whoever travels a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise
The believer is a mirror to the believer
Whoever does not show mercy will not be shown mercy
A Muslim is the brother of a Muslim
Spread peace among yourselves
The best provision is taqwa (God-consciousness)
Fasting is a shield

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief
Your smile in your brother's face is charity
Indeed, Allah loves those who do good
The neighbor has more right to the property close to him
Whoever deceives us is not of us

text: الْعَبْدُ أَقْرَبُ مَا يَكُونُ مِنْ رَبِّهِ وَهُوَ سَاجِدٌ
translation: A servant is closest to his Lord when he is in prostration

text: أَنَا وَكَافِلُ الْيَتِيمِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ هَكَذَا
translation: I and the one who sponsors an orphan will be in Paradise like this
Whoever conceals the faults of a Muslim, Allah will conceal his faults

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَتَبَ الإِحْسَانَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
translation: Allah has prescribed excellence in everything
Do not envy one another and do not hate one another
Righteousness is good character

text: إِنَّ مِنْ أَحَبِّكُمْ إِلَيَّ أَحَاسِنُكُمْ أَخْلاَقًا
translation: The most beloved of you to me are those with the best character
Do not get angry
The lives of believers are equal in value
Allah grants respite but does not neglect

text: مَا مَلأَ آدَمِيٌّ وِعَاءً شَرًّا مِنْ بَطْنٍ
translation: No human has filled a vessel worse than the stomach
Glory be to Allah and praise Him
O Allah, I have wronged myself

text: مَنْ عَادَى لِي وَلِيًّا فَقَدْ آذَنْتُهُ بِالْحَرْبِ
translation: Whoever shows enmity to a friend of Mine, I declare war against him

text: التَّائِبُ مِنَ الذَّنْبِ كَمَنْ لاَ ذَنْبَ لَهُ
translation: One who repents from sin is like one who has no sin

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى صُوَرِكُمْ وَأَمْوَالِكُمْ
translation: Allah does not look at your forms or wealth
A person will be with those whom he loves

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ إِذَا عَمِلَ أَحَدُكُمْ عَمَلاً أَنْ يُتْقِنَهُ
translation: Allah loves that when one of you does something, he perfects it

text: اطْلُبُوا الْعِلْمَ مِنَ الْمَهْدِ إِلَى اللَّحْدِ
translation: Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave
Whoever humbles himself for Allah, Allah will elevate him
You will not believe until you love one another
Arrogance is rejecting truth and looking down on people
Whoever wakes up secure in his dwelling
Seek help in fulfilling needs through secrecy
Be detached from the world and Allah will love you

text: لَوْ تَوَكَّلْتُمْ عَلَى اللَّهِ حَقَّ تَوَكُّلِهِ
translation: If you were to rely upon Allah with true reliance
Patience is half of faith
Indeed, with hardship comes ease
Consult your heart
This religion is easy
Perform Hajj before you cannot
Umrah to Umrah is expiation
Feed people
The best charity is giving water
Whoever sees evil should change it
Each of you is a shepherd and responsible
The parent is the middle gate of Paradise
The pleasure of the Lord is in pleasing the parent

text: أَكْثَرُ مَا يُدْخِلُ النَّاسَ الْجَنَّةَ تَقْوَى اللَّهِ
translation: What most admits people to Paradise is consciousness of Allah

text: الطُّهُورُ شَطْرُ الإِيمَانِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ تَمْلأُ الْمِيزَانَ
translation: Purification is half of faith and praise of Allah fills the scale

text: إِنَّ الْحَلاَلَ بَيِّنٌ وَإِنَّ الْحَرَامَ بَيِّنٌ
translation: The lawful is clear and the unlawful is clear
Jibril continued to advise me about the neighbor
The cool booty is fasting in winter
Cleanliness of one in his clothing
Allah is beautiful and loves beauty
Make things easy and do not make them difficult
Give glad tidings and do not repel
